title: Chapter 1438
content:
Chapter 1438: Chapter 788 Fierce God

"All... dead?"

From the moment he was born, the young master had lived a life of privilege, always above others. For the first time, he felt the icy chill seeping from his bones.

How could they die?

How did they die?

And who was it that killed them?

What exactly is the "thing" in the Demon Refining Diagram?

The hall was empty, all the soul lamps extinguished, only a pale smoke rising slowly, with no one to respond.

At that moment, the soul lamp before Jin Yixuan suddenly emitted a red light, a sinister flame flickering and rising.

Jin Yixuan’s deceased body started to twist and convulse, then raised its head, slowly opening its eyes.

His eyes showed only the whites, filled with blood threads.

And on his shoulder, a fresh red "Blood Shadow" of Mr. Tu appeared.

The young master looked solemn, and asked in a cold voice:

"Sir, what on earth has happened?"

Possessing Jin Yixuan, "Mr. Tu" shed tears of blood, his voice aged and filled with fear:
